blended.narrative: Bristol Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 60°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
